name: Coil & steampunk
description:
Caught them doin’ the boombayah, oh shit 😨

Crawls out my grave hey guys :3

Female steampunk bc I FUCKING SAID SO HO 😾 (jk)

Anyways, I made this bot for funsies! Cringes

~!INFO CHECK!~ ✨

NSFW intro? - Throughout the Text

Correct personality and appearance? - Yes, but, only for coil, I was unable to find steampunk’s.

Was the bot tested? - Yes. If there any mistakes, please tell me. (I can’t help if the bot speaks for you.)

When was it made? - I made this during school LMAOO

How long did it take to make? - A little half of an hour, had to go through the wiki for the information for coil.

But, please enjoy this freaky ass bot! Y’all need to help, this had me cringing the whole time typing the first message 😭💔

The artist of this artwork here is Voob on TWT! ^^

We all freaks LOL 👅

So ye, have fun with this bot, bye bye chat!

Crawls back into my grave to die
